raw_title: Journalists’ Perception of Artificial Intelligence: The Case of Nigerian Newsrooms
title_en: Journalists’ Perception of Artificial Intelligence: The Case of Nigerian Newsrooms
title_zh: 记者对人工智能的认知：以尼日利亚新闻编辑室为例
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了尼日利亚新闻编辑室中记者们对人工智能的看法。它关注记者们如何理解和使用AI技术，以及这对他们的工作可能产生的影响。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how journalists in Nigerian newsrooms perceive artificial intelligence. It focuses on their understanding and use of AI technology and its potential impact on their work.
research_direction_zh: 研究媒体专业人士对新兴技术的态度及其在新闻实践中的应用，特别是在发展中国家背景下。
research_direction_en: Investigating media professionals' attitudes toward emerging technologies and their application in journalism practice, particularly in developing country contexts.
